subcodes.first_line: O My Beloved! The breezes of Thy utterance have caused Me to arise and turn toward Thee, and Thy remembrance hath moved Me to speak in the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوبی قد اقامتنی نفحات بیانکم علی التوجه الیکم و انطقنی ذکرکم فی حب الله
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Shrines and Holy places
